body.title: CLOSED: NE stew-salience invariant guard
body.result: added stew/force_run named constants + ValueError guard at NE init; 4 new tests pass
body.description:
Pass-2 area_3 finding: the documented NE invariant (stew salience 0.65 > NE force-run threshold 0.6) is not enforced in code — a misconfiguration could silently invert it. Add a guard assertion at NE startup that logs ERROR and raises if stew_salience_threshold <= ne_force_run_threshold.

**Affected files:** wild_igor/igor/cognition/narrative_engine.py (LOW inertia — adding one guard, not restructuring)
**Design rules:** docs-in-code
**Scope boundary:** IN — one assert/raise at NE init checking the invariant. OUT — changing the threshold values or NE logic.
**Test plan:** test_narrative_engine.py: construct NE with inverted thresholds (stew=0.5, force-run=0.6); assert ValueError or AssertionError raised at init.
**Pass condition:** NE instantiated with stew_salience <= ne_force_run raises immediately with a clear error message citing the invariant.
